---
title: "KRM"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    toc: false
    number_sections: false
    fig_caption: yes
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{KRM}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
---
# Overview

```{r model_family_header, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
acousticTS:::.model_family_header(
  family = "krm",
  pages = c(
    Overview = "index.html",
    Implementation = "krm-implementation.html",
    Theory = "krm-theory.html"
  )
)
```

```{r krm_overview, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
acousticTS:::.model_family_overview(
  family = "krm",
  summary = paste(
    "The Kirchhoff-ray mode model (`KRM`) is the package's composite fish",
    "family for targets whose body and swimbladder occupy different acoustic",
    "regimes. It keeps a weakly contrasting ray-style body treatment and a",
    "separate swimbladder treatment that switches between low-mode and",
    "high-frequency behavior."
  ),
  core_idea = paste(
    "Treat the fish body with a Kirchhoff-style short-segment approximation,",
    "treat the swimbladder with a simplified cylinder-based modal or",
    "high-frequency branch depending on acoustic size, and combine the complex",
    "component amplitudes coherently."
  ),
  best_for = c(
    "Gas-bearing fish whose body and swimbladder should not be modeled by the same exact family",
    "Fish-like profile data represented by segmented body and bladder outlines",
    "Practical fisheries workflows where composite body-plus-swimbladder structure matters"
  ),
  supports = c(
    "`SBF` composite scatterers",
    "Body contrasts relative to seawater as medium `1` and swimbladder contrasts relative to the body in the local bladder subproblem",
    "Monostatic composite target strength"
  ),
  assumptions = c(
    "Short-segment ray-style treatment of the body",
    "Simplified swimbladder physics chosen by acoustic size regime",
    "Coherent component combination without a full coupled body-bladder boundary-value solve"
  ),
  reading = c(
    "[Implementation](krm-implementation.html): scatterer setup, spectra, and validation tables",
    "[Theory](krm-theory.html): body Kirchhoff reduction, swimbladder mode/ray branches, and coherent composite sum"
  )
)
```
